web.title: Flesch-Kincaid readability & grade level calculations in JavaScript.
web.description: flesch-kincaid.js is a CommonJS module. It's intended to be bundled with the rest of your code using a tool like Webpack or Require.js.

web.title: Every Readability Formula Explained (with JavaScript Examples)
web.description: This makes it stricter than Flesch-Kincaid for jargon-heavy text. The math: grade = 0.4 × ((words / sentences) + 100 × (complex_words / words)).

web.title: flesch - NPM
web.description: Formula to detect the ease of reading a text according to Flesch Reading Ease (1975). Latest version: 2.0.1, last published: 3 years ago.

web.title: lrlna/readability-test: A node.js module for Flesch reading-ease test
